## Summary

[One-paragraph summary of what changed and why]

## Changes

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation

## Verification

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test` / `cargo test` / etc.)
- [ ] Review gates pass (`.husky/pre-commit`)
- [ ] Security review run for sensitive changes (auth, payment, external data)

## Documentation Impact

- [ ] `AGENTS.md` updated (if invariants or hot files changed)
- [ ] `CONVENTIONS.md` updated (if architecture or standards changed)
- [ ] `README.md` updated (if setup or architecture changed)
- [ ] `docs/TECHNICAL_DEBT.md` updated (for unfixed findings)
- [ ] `docs/runbooks/` updated (if operational steps changed)
- [ ] `docs/specs/` updated (if feature spec changed)

## Risk & Rollback

- [ ] Rollback plan documented or obvious
- [ ] No breaking changes without explicit flag

## Review Gates Run

| Gate | Result |
|------|--------|
| Documentation hygiene | pass / fail / N/A |
| [Add gate] | pass / fail / N/A |
